news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCIL ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors
Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCUS ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors

holdings.infoBox: BCUS is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Carpenter Technology stock at 4.48%, InterDigital at 4.32%, NRG Energy at 3.96%, Hawkins at 3.95%, and Meta Platforms at 3.88%.

overview.description: The Bancreek U.S. Large Cap ETF (BCUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US large-cap companies the sub-adviser believes exhibit structurally advantaged business models. BCUS was launched on Dec 20, 2023 and is issued by Bancreek.

data.title: BCUS ETF: Finding Opportunities in International Markets
data.text: Markets are higher to begin the week as small caps continue to rally. Andrew Skatoff discusses finding opportunities in international equities.
